## Why?

What gets clearer, more reliable, or more useful.

## Checklist

- [ ] It stays simple and readable in one sitting.
- [ ] It stays setup-agnostic (Mac / Windows / Linux, with or without Obsidian or a voice tool).
- [ ] It does not weaken the privacy rules (Private folder, no invented quotes, local-only).
- [ ] I tested it on: <!-- e.g. macOS + Obsidian, no voice tool -->
